No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GARY VELASQUEZ'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction is Off calendar per the parties' stipulation. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Deborah Neville, CSR 703

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
